text: Absolutely love this app! The new update is amazing and works perfectly.
App keeps crashing every time I open it. Very frustrating and unusable.
Great features overall but the loading speed could be improved a bit.
Too many ads and premium popups. Cannot listen to music without interruption.
Best music app I have ever used. Recommend to everyone.
Terrible update broke everything. Songs skip and playlist does not save.
Average app. Nothing special but gets the job done most of the time.
Battery drain is insane. App heats up my phone within minutes of use.
Customer support was very helpful and resolved my issue quickly.
Cannot download songs for offline listening. Feature is completely broken.
UI is clean and intuitive. Very easy to navigate and find songs.
App crashes when switching between playlists. This is a known bug for months.
Love the personalized recommendations. Discover weekly is always on point.
Login keeps failing. Cannot access my account. Lost all my saved playlists.
Decent app but competitors offer better free tier without so many restrictions.
Sound quality is excellent. Can really hear the difference in audio quality.
Constant buffering even on fast wifi. Streaming quality is terrible now.
The collaborative playlist feature is fantastic. Use it daily with friends.
Premium price is too high for what is offered. Not worth the monthly cost.
Works well on all my devices. Seamless sync between phone and laptop.
Dark mode is broken on the latest version. White flash burns my eyes at night.
Amazing app. Updated regularly with new features. Best music streaming service.
App is okay but nothing extraordinary. Expected more from a paid subscription.
Cannot play songs in a specific order. Shuffle is forced on free accounts.
Podcast selection is incredible. Found so many new shows I love.
Search function is broken. Cannot find songs by lyrics anymore.
Great app overall. Minor bugs here and there but nothing major.
App deleted all my downloaded songs after update. One month of downloads gone.
Love the sleep timer feature. Perfect for falling asleep to music.
Mixed feelings. Some features are great but too many bugs in recent updates.
Crashes constantly on Android 14. Developer needs to fix this urgently.
Best app on the market. Worth every penny of the premium subscription.
Ads are way too frequent and too loud. Cannot enjoy music at all.
Really smooth performance after the latest patch. Good job dev team.
App freezes when I try to share a song. Completely broken share feature.
Brilliant app. The crossfade feature between songs is absolutely perfect.
Too many bugs in the latest update. Rolling back to previous version.
Offline mode works great. Perfect for long flights without internet.
Customer service is non-existent. Sent three emails and got no response.
Incredible music library. Can find any song from any era instantly.
App randomly pauses music. Very annoying during workouts.
Love the artist radio feature. Always discovers new music I enjoy.
Premium subscription charged twice this month. Billing error not resolved.
Perfect app for music lovers. Has everything you could possibly need.
Okay app but the free version is too restricted to be useful.
Good sound quality and a huge selection. Happy with this service.
App crashes on startup every single time after the latest update.
Exceptional app. The algorithm always knows what I want to listen to.
Too expensive for the quality offered. Many competitors do better for less.
Reliable and fast. Never had major issues with this app over two years.
